verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Lift up your heads O you gates, Swing open wide You ancient doors.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Let the King of kings Take His rightful place, Make room, make way For our King of grace.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Lift up your hands, Open up your hearts; His vict'ry over sin And death is ours.

verse.name: v4
v5
verse.lines: King of glory, Lord of power, King of glory, Lord of power, King of glory, Lord of power.
